headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) After Its Recent Copper Price Rally?
summary: Wondering whether Freeport-McMoRan's current share price really reflects its underlying value, or if the stock is getting ahead of itself. The stock last closed at US$64.37, with returns of 15.8% over the past week, down 5.1% over the last month, 24.0% year to date, 66.5% over one year, 85.5% over three years and 56.1% over five years. Recent price moves have come alongside ongoing attention on copper producers and broader materials stocks, with investors reassessing how these companies fit...
